histogram.name: ReadAloud.Eligibility.IneligiblityReason
histogram.summary: Histogram for recording why a user is not eligible for the ReadAloud feature. Emitted when the user profile is available and the user is ineligible. Conditions are checked in ReadAloudFeatures.

histogram.name: ReadAloud.Eligibility.IsUserEligible
histogram.summary: Histogram for recording if a user is eligible for ReadAloud. Emitted when the user profile is available.

histogram.name: ReadAloud.IsPageReadable
histogram.summary: Histogram for recording if a page readability check comes back successful or not. The readability check is run on each page load for Android clients who are eligible for ReadAloud.

histogram.name: ReadAloud.IsTabPlaybackCreationSuccessful
histogram.summary: Records if a tab playback creation succeeds or fails. Emitted in the tab playback creation callback. Does not mean playback has started.
